title: loheria bracteata
intro: Loheria bracteata, also known as the Philippine angel's trumpet, is a plant species native to the Philippines that belongs to the Loheria genus of flowering plants. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Loheria bracteata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as used in traditional medicine practices in the Philippines.
